<style type="text/css">

/* =======================================
   共通スタイル
======================================== */
.modaal-wrapper .modaal-container {
    border-radius: 6px;
    width: 100%;
    /* デフォルトはSPサイズに対応 */
}

.modaal-wrapper .modaal-container .modaal-content-container {
    padding: 15px;
}

#modal-recommend h2 {
    color: #00b2b2;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
}

#modal-recommend p {
    color: #999;
    font-weight: normal;
    font-size: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.modal-main-img {
    width: 100%;
}

#modal-recommend .follow-area {
    font-size: 8px;
    font-weight: bold;
    color: #555;
    background-color: #FFF3CF;
    padding: 6px 6px 6px 14px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
}

#modal-recommend .follow-area img {
    width: 16px;
}

#modal-recommend .follow-area span {
    padding-left: 6px;
}

.participation-heading {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: bold;
    color: #00B2B2;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin: 0;
}

.participation-heading-twin {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    margin: 0 auto 10px auto;
    text-align: center;
    font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #555;
}

.participation-heading-twin::before,
.participation-heading-twin::after {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    content: "";
    border-top: 1px solid #555;
}

.participation-heading-twin::before {
    left: 0%;
    width: 35%;
}

.participation-heading-twin::after {
    right: 0%;
    width: 35%;
}

.modal-sticky-bottom-area {
    position: sticky;
    bottom: 0;
    margin: 15px 0px -7px 0px;
    padding: 15px 0 15px 0;
    background: #ffffff99;
    border-top: 1px solid #ccc;
}

.participation-company-logo-area {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 5px;
    justify-content: flex-start;
}

.participation-company-logo-area img {
    width: calc((100% - 25px) / 6);
    height: auto;
}

/* =======================================
   PC版スタイル (画面幅601px以上)
======================================== */
@media (min-width: 601px) {
    .modaal-wrapper .modaal-container {
        border-radius: 16px;
        width: 600px;
    }

    #modal-recommend h2 {
        font-size: 17px;
    }

    #modal-recommend p {
        font-size: 12px;
    }

    #modal-recommend .follow-area {
        font-size: 12px;
        padding: 8px 8px 8px 18px;
        margin-bottom: 22px;
    }

    #modal-recommend .follow-area img {
        width: 22px;
    }

    #modal-recommend .follow-area span {
        padding-left: 8px;
    }

    .participation-heading {
        font-size: 20px;
        letter-spacing: 5px;
    }

    .participation-heading-twin {
        font-size: 16px;
        margin: 0 auto 15px auto;
        letter-spacing: 2px;
    }

    .participation-heading-twin::before,
    .participation-heading-twin::after {
        width: 170px;
    }

    .modal-sticky-bottom-area {
        margin: 10px 0px -5px 0px;
        padding: 20px 0 20px 0;
    }

    .participation-company-logo-area {
        gap: 10px;
    }

    .participation-company-logo-area img {
        width: calc((100% - 50px) / 6);
    }
}
</style>

<style>
.top-event-list{
	background-color: white;
	width: auto;
	margin-bottom: 35px;
	text-align: left;
	padding: 5px 15px 5px 15px;
	position: relative;
}
.top-list-title{
	font-size: 15px;
	margin: 7px;
}
.top-area-text{
	font-size: 14px;
	margin: 10px;
	line-height: normal;
}
.top-ul{
	display: flex;
	margin: 15px 0 0 0;
}
.top-event-link{
	color: #0000EE;
	text-decoration: none;
	margin-left: 10px;
	font-weight: bold;
	font-size: 14px;
}
.contents-qa-area {
	width: auto;
	margin: 0 auto;
	overflow: hidden;
	background-color: white;
	text-align: left;
}
.qa-title {
	color: #00B2B2;
	font-size:30px;
	font-weight: bold;
	margin-bottom: 25px;
}
.qa-area {
	margin-bottom: 30px;
}
.qa-area .qa-question, .qa-area .qa-answer {
	position: relative;
	padding: 0px 50px 15px 70px;
	margin-bottom: 16px;
	word-wrap: break-word;
	font-size: 14px;
	font-weight: bold;
	color: #555555;
	top: 7px;
}
.qa-area .qa-answer {
	margin-bottom: 20px;
	padding-bottom: 15px;
}
.qa-area .qa-question:before, .qa-area .qa-answer:before {
	content: "";
	position: absolute;
	top: -20px;
	left: 0;
	width: 45px;
	height: 45px;
}
.qa-area .qa-question:before {
	background: url(/assets/pc/common/images/icon-qa-q.png);
	filter: invert(100%);
	margin: 8px 0px 0px 15px;
	transform: scale(0.7);
}
.qa-area .qa-answer:before {
	background: url(/assets/pc/common/images/icon-qa-a.png);
	filter: invert(100%);
	margin: 15px 0px 0px 15px;
	transform: scale(0.7);
}
.qa-area .qa-line {
	width: 100%;
	height: 3px;
	background: #F8F8F8;
	margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.qa-area .qa-line-top {
	width: 100%;
	margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.qa-list {
	margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.qa-question:after {
	position: absolute;
	display: block;
	content: '';
	top: 20%;
	right: 22px;
	width: 8px;
	height: 8px;
	border-top: 4px solid #000;
	border-right: 4px solid #000;
	transform: rotate(135deg);
	transition: all .3s ease-in-out;
}
.qa-question.open:after {
	transform: rotate(-45deg);
	top: 20%;
}
.qa-answer {
	display: none;
}
	
.list-title{
	font-size: 13px;
	margin: auto;
}
.li-pickup-area{
	display: inline-block;
}
#pickupWordEventArea, #pickupWordRecruitmentArea, #pickupWordEventInternArea {
	padding: 10px 20px;
	font-size: 0;
	font-weight: bold;
	background-color: #F6F6F6;
}

#pickupWordEventArea>section, #pickupWordRecruitmentArea>section, #pickupWordEventInternArea>section {
	display: flex;
	margin: 4px 0 4px 0;
	font-size: 12px;
}

#pickupWordEventArea>section>ul, #pickupWordRecruitmentArea>section>ul, #pickupWordEventInternArea>section>ul {
	display: block;
	margin: 4px 0 4px 0;

}

#pickupWordEventArea>section>ul, #pickupWordEventArea>section>div>a, #pickupWordRecruitmentArea>section>ul, #pickupWordRecruitmentArea>section>div>a, #pickupWordEventInternArea>section>ul, #pickupWordEventInternArea>section>div>a{

}

#pickupWordEventArea>section>h6:first-of-type, #pickupWordRecruitmentArea>section>h6:first-of-type, #pickupWordEventInternArea>section>h6:first-of-type {
	width: 60px;

	margin: 0 10px 0 0;
	font-size: 12px;
	line-height: 25px;
	flex-shrink: 0
}

#pickupWordEventArea>section>h6.pickup-title:first-of-type, #pickupWordRecruitmentArea>section>h6.pickup-title:first-of-type, #pickupWordEventInternArea>section>h6.pickup-title:first-of-type {
	width: 60px;
	white-space: nowrap;
	margin: 0 10px 0 0;
	font-size: 12px;
	line-height: 35px;
	flex-shrink: 0
}

#pickupWordEventArea>section:nth-of-type(2)>div:first-of-type, #pickupWordRecruitmentArea>section:nth-of-type(2)>div:first-of-type, #pickupWordEventInternArea>section:nth-of-type(2)>div:first-of-type {

.pickupWordEventLink, .pickupWordRecruitmentLink, .pickupWordEventInternArea {

}

.pick-up-style{

}

#pickupWordEventArea>section:nth-of-type(2)>div>a:hover, #pickupWordRecruitmentArea>section:nth-of-type(2)>div>a:hover, #pickupWordEventInternArea>section:nth-of-type(2)>div>a:hover {
	color: #ebffff;

}

#pickupWordEventInternArea > section:nth-of-type(2) > ul> li > a.pickupWordEventIndustryLink {

.searchPickupWordEvent{

}
.guide-area-under-margin{

}

.date-box {
  display: inline-block;
  position: relative;
}
.date-box::before {
  content: "";
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  background: url(/assets/pc/images/calendar_today_black_24dp.svg) no-repeat center center / auto 100%;

}
.flatpickr-mobile{
	border-radius: 0;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    box-shadow: 2px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.4) inset;
    box-sizing: border-box;

}

    z-index: -1;
}

.follow-area{
	font-size: 16px;
	font-weight: bold;
	color: #555555;
	background-color: #FFF3CF;
	padding: 8px 8px 8px 18px;
	display: flex;
	align-items: center;
}
.follow-area-icon{
	width: 22px;
}
 .follow-area-message{
	 padding-left: 8px;
 }

.participation-company-logo{
    border-radius: 3px;

}
.participation-company-logo-span{
	display: inline-block;

.contants {
	overflow-x: hidden;

@media only screen and (max-width : 700px) {

		font-size: 12px;
	 }

@media only screen and (max-width : 600px) {
	
	 .participation-company-area{
		max-height: calc((100vw - 80px) / 6);

		max-height: calc((100vw - 80px) / 6 * 3);

	    width: calc(100% / 6 - 1%);
	}
}

.category-title {

}

.guide-area {
	position: relative;

}

.internship-summary-title {
	font-size: 1.4em;
	font-weight: bold;
	color: #008c8d;
	margin-top: 1.4em;
	margin-bottom: 0.8em;
}

.internship-sub-title {
	font-size: 1.2em;
	font-weight: bold;
	margin-top: 1em;
	margin-bottom: 0.5em;
}

.internship-summary {

.internship-guide p,

	margin-bottom: 1.3rem;

@media screen and (max-width: 548px) {
	.internship-guide h5,
	.internship-guide p,
	.internship-guide ul {
		margin-left: 0;
	}
}

.rank {
	color: #fff;
	position: absolute;
	top: -10px;
	left: -6px;
	padding: 4px 12px 2px 12px;
	font-weight: bold;
	text-align: center;
	letter-spacing: 0.77px;
}
.rank-second {
	background-color: #fe5b35;
}
.rank-third {
	background-color: #3187c2;
}
.rank:before {
  position: absolute;
  content: '';
  top: 100%;
  left: 0;
  border: none;
  border-bottom: solid 3px transparent;
  border-right: solid 6px #004E4E;
}
.rank:after {
  position: absolute;
  content: '';
  top: 0;
  left: 100%;
  border: none;
  border-top: solid 6px transparent;
  border-left: solid 3px #004E4E;
}
.rank-second:before {
	border-right: solid 6px #B12200;
}
.rank-second:after {
	border-left: solid 3px #B12200;
}
.rank-third:before {
	border-right: solid 6px #002E4E;
}
.rank-third:after {
	border-left: solid 3px #002E4E;
}

.article-list-tag li {
	border-top-width: 2px;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	color: #fff;
	float: left;
	margin: 0 2px 5px 2px !important;
	min-width: 70px;
	padding: 2px 10px;
	text-align: center;

	font-size: 11px !important;
	font-weight: 700;
	background-color: #00b2b2;

	border: solid 1px #F0F0F0;
	border-top: 2px solid #00B2B2;

}

	border-top: 2px solid #181878 !important;
	background-color: #181878 !important;
}

	width: 100%;

}

.card-area {
	display: flex;
	flex-flow: row wrap;
	justify-content: flex-start;
	-webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);

	margin: 0 auto 48px;
}

.card-caption{
	margin: 0;
    color: #999999;
    font-size: 13px;
}

.tag li {
	margin: 0 4px 5px 0;
	font-weight: 400;
  	font-size: 12px;
}

.event-tag {
    box-sizing: border-box;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: absolute;
    top: -10px;
    left: -10px;
}

.event-tag li {
    box-sizing: border-box;
    color: #fff;
    float: left;
    margin: 0 3px 5px 3px;
    min-width: 70px;
    padding: 2px 10px;
    text-align: center;
    font-weight: bold;
    font-size: 18px;
    text-align: center;
    letter-spacing: 0.77px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.event-label-tag:first-child:before {
  position: absolute;
  content: '';
  top: 100%;
  left: 0;
  border: none;
  border-bottom: solid 3px transparent;
  border-right: solid 6px #004E4E;
}
.event-label-tag:after {
  position: absolute;
  content: '';
  top: 0;
  left: 100%;
  border: none;
  border-top: solid 10px transparent;
  border-left: solid 4px #004E4E;
}
.event-label-tag-new:before {
	border-right: solid 6px #B12200;
}
.event-label-tag-new:after {
	border-left: solid 3px #B12200;
}
.event-label-tag-end:before {
	border-right: solid 6px #002E4E;
}
.event-label-tag-end:after {
	border-left: solid 3px #002E4E;
}

	background: #f8f8f8;
}

    margin: 0 auto;
}

.event-card {
  background-color: #fff;

  margin-bottom: 30px;
  padding: 26px 20px 20px 20px;
  box-shadow: 0 .5rem 1rem rgba(0,0,0,.15)!important;

.premium-bg{

}

.normal-bg{

    flex-wrap: wrap;
    justify-content: space-between;

.event-btn {

    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;   
}

.event-btn-end {
    font-size: 18px;

				<h3 class="internship-article-heading">2028年卒インターンスケジュール</h3>
				<hr class="heading-line mb-xl mt-s">
				<div class="guide-area bg-plain pg-base internship-summary internship-guide" style="text-align: left;">
					<p>
						大学3年生が参加するインターンには、3つの時期に分けて行われるものがあります。<br>
						応募期限は企業やプログラムによって異なるため、事前に企業のホームページでインターンの情報を確認することが重要です。<br>
						企業によってはインターンの参加が本選考の結果に影響する場合もあるため、早めに選考準備をしましょう！
					</p>
					<ul>
						<li>
							<h5 class="internship-sub-title ml-s">①サマーインターン</h5>
							<p>
								情報解禁・応募開始：3月～5月頃<br>
								選考：4月～6月頃<br>
								実施期間：6月～9月頃
							</p>
						</li>
						<li>
							<h5 class="internship-sub-title ml-s">②オータムインターン</h5>
							<p>
								情報解禁・応募開始：8月～9月頃<br>
								選考：9月～10月頃<br>
								実施期間：10月～12月頃
							</p>
						</li>
						<li>
							<h5 class="internship-sub-title ml-s">③ウィンターインターン</h5>
							<p>
								情報解禁・応募開始：10月～12月頃<br>
								選考：11月～12月頃<br>
								実施期間：1月～2月頃
							</p>
						</li>
					</ul>
					<h4 class="internship-summary-title">サマーインターンの特徴</h4>
					<ul>
						<li>
							<h5 class="internship-sub-title ml-s">1. 本選考を有利にする重要な機会</h5>
							<p>
								・サマーインターンに参加することで、企業のカルチャーや業務内容を深く理解できます。<br>
								・インターン参加者を優遇する企業もあるため、本選考に有利に働くことが多いです。
							</p>
						</li>
						<li>
							<h5 class="internship-sub-title ml-s">2. 長期間のプログラムが多い</h5>
							<p>
								・他のシーズンと比べて1週間以上のプログラムが多く、実務経験を積みやすい。<br>
								・ ワークショップ形式やプロジェクト型の実践的な内容が中心。
							</p>
						</li>
						<li>
							<h5 class="internship-sub-title ml-s">3. 応募倍率が高く、事前の十分な準備が必要</h5>
							<p>
								・知名度の高い企業では倍率が高く、エントリーシートや面接対策が必要。<br>
								・早めの準備が合否を左右するため、自己分析や企業研究を3月くらいから進めておくと有利。
							</p>
						</li>
					</ul>
					<p>
						サマーインターンは就活のスタートとして非常に良い機会です。<br>
						早めの情報収集と準備を行い、計画的に応募しましょう！
					</p>
					<h4 class="internship-summary-title">オータムインターンの特徴</h4>
					<ul>
						<li>

	<script>
		/*<![CDATA[*/
		$(function() {
			const modalRecommendUrl = "\/modal-recommend\/";
            
            // ページロード時にAjax通信を行い、モーダルを開くかどうかを判断
		    modalRecommendAjax(modalRecommendUrl, function(data) {
		        // Ajaxの返り値がnullまたは空でない場合にのみモーダルを開く
		        if (data && data.trim().length > 0) {
		            // モーダルを開く
		            $(".modal-recommend-open").modaal({
		                start_open: false, // ページロード時にモーダルは開かない
		                before_open: function() {
		                    // モーダルの内容を設定
		                    $('#modal-recommend').html(data);
		                    $('.modaal-content-container').html(data);
		                    $('.modaal-inner-wrapper').css({ 'cursor': 'auto' });
		                }
		            });
		            $(".modal-recommend-open").modaal('open');  // Ajax成功後にモーダルを開く
		        } else {
		            return;
		        }
		    });
		
			// モーダルレコメンドAjax
			function modalRecommendAjax(modalRecommendUrl, callback) {
			    $.ajax({
			        type: "GET",
			        url: modalRecommendUrl,
			        dataType: "html",
			        success: function(data) {
			            callback(data); // データをコールバックで返す
			        },
			        error: function(XMLHttpRequest, status, errorThrown) {
			            console.log("Error: " + errorThrown);
			            callback(null); // エラーの場合はnullを返す
			        }
			    });
			}
		});
    /*]]>*/
	</script>

<script>
	/*<![CDATA[*/
	$(document).ready(function() {
		
		$(".accordion-event-detail-btn").click(function() {
			$(this).parents(".accorddion-conts").toggleClass("ca-open");
			$(this).toggleClass("ab-hit");
			if ($(this).hasClass("ab-hit")) {
				$(this).children("b").html("閉じる");
				$(this).find(".pm-icon").removeClass("plus-mark");
				$(this).find(".pm-icon").addClass("minus-mark");
			} else {
				$(this).children("b").html("続きを読む");
				$(this).find(".pm-icon").removeClass("minus-mark");
				$(this).find(".pm-icon").addClass("plus-mark");
			}
			$(this).children("span").toggleClass("ms");
		});
	});
	// コンテンツカード【イベント一覧バナー】
	(function() {
		let latestCards = null;
		let isBannerRevealed = false;

		const revealBannerArea = () => {
			if (isBannerRevealed) return;
			const container = document.querySelector('.single-banner');
			if (container && !container.classList.contains('is-visible')) {
				container.classList.add('is-visible');
				isBannerRevealed = true;
			}
		};

		const getTargetYearFromUrl = () => {
			const url = window.location.href;
			
			// パス形式 (例：year-2028)
			const pathMatch = url.match(/year-(\d{4})/);
			if (pathMatch) return pathMatch[1];

			// クエリパラメータ形式 (例：schoolYear=2028)
			const searchParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
			const schoolYear = searchParams.get('schoolYear');
			if (schoolYear && /^\d{4}$/.test(schoolYear)) {
				return schoolYear;
			}

			return null;
		};

		const renderBanner = (cards) => {
			if (!cards || !cards.cards) return;
			
			const currentYear = getTargetYearFromUrl();
			const cardArray = cards.cards;

			// 年次が一致するコンテンツカードが設定されているか
			let targetCard = cardArray.find(card => {
				const extras = card.extras;
				return extras?.position === 'event-list' && String(extras['target-year']) === String(currentYear);
			});

			// なければ all(全ての学生)
			if (!targetCard) {
				targetCard = cardArray.find(card => {
					const extras = card.extras;
					return extras?.position === 'event-list' && extras['target-year'] === 'all';
				});
			}

			const container = document.querySelector('.single-banner');
			if (!container) return;

			if (targetCard) {
				const imageUrl = targetCard.extras['image'] || targetCard.imageUrl;
				const linkUrl = targetCard.extras['url'] || targetCard.url;
				
				container.innerHTML = `
					<a href="${linkUrl || 'javascript:void(0);'}" class="js-event-list-click" style="display:inline-block; width:100%;">
						<img src="${imageUrl}" class="single-banner-img" style="display:block; margin:0 auto; border:0;">
					</a>`;
				
				braze.logContentCardImpressions([targetCard]);
				//計測
				$(container).off('click.eventlist').on('click.eventlist', '.js-event-list-click', function(e) {
					const targetUrl = $(this).attr('href');
					if (targetUrl !== 'javascript:void(0);') {
						e.preventDefault();
						e.stopPropagation();
						braze.logContentCardClick(targetCard);
						if (typeof braze.requestImmediateDataFlush === 'function') {
							braze.requestImmediateDataFlush();
						}
						setTimeout(() => { window.location.href = targetUrl; }, 1500);
					}
				});
			} else {
				// 対象がない場合はなにもしない
				container.innerHTML = '';
			}
			revealBannerArea();
		};

		const initEventListBanner = () => {
			braze.subscribeToContentCardsUpdates((cards) => {
				latestCards = cards;
				renderBanner(cards);
			});

			// ─── Brazeのレート制限対策（30秒以内の再取得を抑制） ───
			const now = Date.now();
			const lastRefresh = sessionStorage.getItem('braze_last_el_refresh');
			const refreshInterval = 30000; 

			if (!lastRefresh || (now - parseInt(lastRefresh, 10) > refreshInterval)) {
				braze.requestContentCardsRefresh();
				sessionStorage.setItem('braze_last_el_refresh', now.toString());
			} else {
				// 30秒以内なら、SDK内のローカルキャッシュを使って即座に描画
				if (typeof braze.getCachedContentCards === 'function') {
					const cachedContentCardsObj = braze.getCachedContentCards();
					const cachedCards = (cachedContentCardsObj && cachedContentCardsObj.cards) ? cachedContentCardsObj : null;
					if (cachedCards) {
						latestCards = cachedCards;
						renderBanner(cachedCards);
					}
				}
			}

			// URLの変更を検知
			let lastUrl = location.href;
			const checkUrlAndRender = () => {
				if (location.href !== lastUrl) {
					lastUrl = location.href;
					if (latestCards) {
						renderBanner(latestCards);
					} else {
						const nowUrlCheck = Date.now();
						const lastRefreshUrl = sessionStorage.getItem('braze_last_el_refresh');
						
						if (!lastRefreshUrl || (nowUrlCheck - parseInt(lastRefreshUrl, 10) > refreshInterval)) {
							braze.requestContentCardsRefresh();
							sessionStorage.setItem('braze_last_el_refresh', nowUrlCheck.toString());
						} else {
							if (typeof braze.getCachedContentCards === 'function') {
								const cachedContentCardsObj = braze.getCachedContentCards();
								const cachedCards = (cachedContentCardsObj && cachedContentCardsObj.cards) ? cachedContentCardsObj : null;
								if (cachedCards) {
									latestCards = cachedCards;
									renderBanner(cachedCards);
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			};

			const observer = new MutationObserver(checkUrlAndRender);
			observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });

			window.addEventListener('popstate', checkUrlAndRender);
			
			const wrapHistory = (type) => {
				const orig = history[type];
				return function() {
					const res = orig.apply(this, arguments);
					checkUrlAndRender();
					return res;
				};
			};
			history.pushState = wrapHistory('pushState');
			history.replaceState = wrapHistory('replaceState');
		};

		if (typeof braze !== 'undefined') {
			initEventListBanner();
		} else {
			let retry = 0;
			const timer = setInterval(() => {
				retry++;
				if (typeof braze !== 'undefined') {
					clearInterval(timer);
					initEventListBanner();
				} else if (retry >= 10) {
					clearInterval(timer);
					revealBannerArea();
				}
			}, 200);
		}

		// タイムアウト用
		setTimeout(() => {
			if (!isBannerRevealed) {
				revealBannerArea();
			}
		}, 2500);
	})();
	/*]]>*/
  </script>

    <script>
        /*<![CDATA[*/
        $(function () {
            const baseRecommendUrl = "\/recommend\/open\/";
            const displayPageCls = getPageClass();

            if (!displayPageCls) return;

            const requestData = buildRequestData(displayPageCls);
            const encodedRequestData = encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(requestData));
            // ページロード時にAjax通信を行い、モーダルを開くかどうかを判断
            fetchModalContent(baseRecommendUrl, encodedRequestData);

            // モーダルの内容を取得して表示
            function fetchModalContent(url, data) {
                $.ajax({
                    type: "GET",
                    url: url,
                    data: { requestData: data },
                    contentType: "application/json",
                    dataType: "html",
                    success: function (response) {
                        if (response?.trim()) {
                            $('#footer-recommend-area').html(response);
                        }
                    },
                    error: function (xhr, status, error) {
                        console.error("Error fetching modal content:", error);
                    }
                });
            }

            // リクエストデータを構築
            function buildRequestData(pageCls) {
                const data = { 
					displayPageCls: pageCls,
					url : window.location.href
                 };

                switch (pageCls) {
                    case "1":
                        return Object.assign(data, {
                            schoolYear: $('[name="schoolYear"]').val(),
                            eventTypeList: getCheckedValues("eventTypeList"),
                            regionClsList: getCheckedValues("regionClsList"),
                            business: $('[name="business"]').val()
                        });
                    case "2":
                        return Object.assign(data, {
                            eventId: getUrlId("/event/"),
                            webinarId: getQueryParam('webinarId')
                        });
                    case "3":
                        return Object.assign(data, {
                            schoolYear: $('[name="schoolYear"]').val(),
                            recruitmentStatus: $('[name="recruitmentStatus"][type="hidden"]').val(),
                            business: $('[name="business"]').val()
                        });
                    case "4":
                        return Object.assign(data, {
                            recruitmentId: getUrlId("/recruitment/")
                        });
                    case "5":
                        return Object.assign(data, {
                            business: $('[name="business"]').val()
                        });
                    case "6":
                        return Object.assign(data, {
                            companyId: getUrlId("/company/")
                        });
                    case "7":
                        return Object.assign(data, {
                            eventId: getUrlId("/event/"),
                            companyId: getUrlId("/company/")
                        });
                    default:
                        return data;
                }
            }

            // URLの指定された部分からIDを抽出
            function getUrlId(pattern) {
                const url = window.location.href;
                const match = url.match(new RegExp(pattern + "(\\d+)"));
                return match ? match[1] : null;
            }

            // クエリパラメータから値を取得
            function getQueryParam(param) {
                const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
                return urlParams.get(param);
            }

            // チェックボックスの値を取得
            function getCheckedValues(selector) {
                return $(`[name="${selector}"]:checked`).map(function () {
                    return $(this).val();
                }).get();
            }

            // ページクラスを判定
            function getPageClass() {
                const path = window.location.pathname.replace(/^\/web-user/, '');
                const patterns = {
                    "0": /^\/$/,                          // トップページ
                    "1": /^\/search\/.*/,                // イベント一覧
                    "2": /^\/event\/[0-9]+\/$/,          // イベント詳細（CDC主催）
                    "3": /^\/recruitment\/.*/,           // 募集要項一覧
                    "4": /^\/company\/[0-9]+\/recruitment\/[0-9]+\/$/, // 募集要項詳細
                    "5": /^\/company\/(?![0-9])/,        // 企業一覧
                    "6": /^\/company\/[0-9]+\/$/,        // 企業詳細
                    "7": /^\/company\/[0-9]+\/event\/[0-9]+\/$/ // イベント詳細（企業主催）
                };

                for (const [key, regex] of Object.entries(patterns)) {
                    if (regex.test(path)) return key;
                }
                return ""; // 該当なし
            }

            // おすすめクローズ処理
            $('#footer-recommend-area').on("click", ".recommend-close", function () {
                const $targetArea = $(this).closest('.recommend-area');
                closeRecommend($targetArea);
                return false;
            });

            // おすすめクローズ処理（Ajax送信）
            function closeRecommend(target) {
                const data = {
                    targetId: $('#target-id').val(),
                    targetPageCls: $('#target-page-cls').val(),
                    displayPageCls: $('#display-page-cls').val(),
                    recommendSetId: $('#recommend-set-id').val()
                };

                const url = $('#recommend-close').attr('action');
                const method = $('#recommend-close').attr('method');

                $.ajax({
                    url: url,
                    type: method,
                    data: $.param(data),
                    success: function () {
                        target.hide();
                    },
                    error: function (xhr, status, error) {
                        console.error("Error closing recommend area:", error);
                    }
                });
            }
        });
        /*]]>*/
    </script>
